bubble.nodeName: the message bubble element inside content

groupAuthorName.description: Class applied to the group author name element.

groupTimestamp.description: Class applied to the group timestamp element (compact variant only).

inlineMetaSpacer.nodeName: the inline meta spacer element (default variant)

inlineMeta.nodeName: the inline meta container element (default variant)

dateDividerLine.nodeName: the horizontal rule on each side of the date divider label

dateDividerLabel.nodeName: the formatted day label inside the date divider

roleUser.description: Applied when the message role is 'user'

roleAssistant.description: Applied when the message role is 'assistant'

streaming.description: Applied while the message is streaming

error.description: Applied when the message has an error status

noAvatar.description: Applied when the avatar slot is hidden (`slots.avatar: null`) so the grid drops the avatar track.

slotDescriptions.actions:
The actions component, rendered under the bubble.
Receives `{ messageId }` as props.
Pass `null` to hide actions entirely; omit to render only `extraActions`
(from `slotProps.actions`) if provided.
slotDescriptions.authorName:
The author-name label. Rendered by the surrounding `ChatMessageGroup`
(default variant: above the bubble; compact variant: inside the message
grid). Forwarded through `slots.message.authorName` from `ChatBox`. Pass
`null` to hide.
slotDescriptions.avatar:
The avatar component. Pass `null` to hide it and collapse the avatar grid track.
Function form receives the message context and may return `null` for per-message hiding,
but the grid track is only dropped when the slot itself is `null`.
slotDescriptions.content: The bubble component that renders message content.
slotDescriptions.error:
The error component rendered under the bubble when status === 'error'.
Pass `null` to hide the error surface entirely (no component is mounted).
slotDescriptions.inlineMeta: The inline meta component (default variant; rendered inside the bubble). Pass `null` to hide it.
slotDescriptions.meta: The external meta component (compact variant). Pass `null` to hide it.
slotDescriptions.streamingIndicator:
The animated streaming indicator, rendered inside the bubble (after the
streamed parts) while this assistant message has `status: 'streaming'`.
Pass `null` to hide it.
